name: vereinskalender
description: Schedule management system for organization groups with multi-platform support

scripts.dev: npm run server:dev & npm run web:dev
scripts.type-check: npm run -w packages/web type-check && npm run -w packages/mobile type-check && npm run -w packages/server type-check
scripts.build:all: npm run shared:build && npm run web:build && npm run server:build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w packages/web && npm install -w packages/mobile && npm install -w packages/shared && npm install -w packages/server
